title: carex × kneuckeri
intro: Carex × kneuckeri, also known as Kneucker's sedge, is a hybrid plant species of the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that combines the characteristics of Carex montana and Carex digitata. The medicinal properties of Carex × kneuckeri lie in its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections due to its antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Carex × kneuckeri is often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and promote wound healing and skin health.
